trials.artifactText:
feat(api): Add per-client rate limiting

Limit requests to 100 per minute per client IP and return 429 responses with
a retry-after header when clients exceed the limit. Document the new behavior
and fix item pagination to return the configured page size.

feat(api): Add per-IP request rate limiting

Limit each client IP to 100 requests per minute and return 429 responses with
a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Fix item pagination to return the full configured page size, and document the
rate limiting behavior in the README.

feat(api): add per-IP rate limiting

Limit clients to 100 requests per minute and return 429 responses with a
retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Document the new rate limit behavior and fix item pagination to return the
configured page size.

feat(api): add per-client request rate limiting

- Limit requests to 100 per minute by client IP
- Return 429 responses with retry-after when clients exceed the limit
- Document rate limiting behavior in the README
- Fix item pagination to return the full configured page size

feat(api): add per-client request rate limiting

Limit each client IP to 100 requests per minute and return a 429 response
with a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Also fix item pagination to return the full configured page size.

feat(api): add per-client request rate limiting

Limit clients to 100 requests per minute by IP and return 429 responses with a
retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Also fix item pagination so each page returns the configured page size.

feat(api): add per-client request rate limiting

- Limit requests to 100 per minute by client IP
- Return 429 responses with a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded
- Document rate-limit behavior in the README
- Fix item pagination to return the configured page size

feat(api): add per-client request rate limiting

- Limit each client IP to 100 requests per minute
- Return 429 responses with retry-after when the limit is exceeded
- Document rate limit behavior in the README
- Fix item pagination to return the full page size

feat(api): add request rate limiting

- Limit clients to 100 requests per minute by IP address
- Return 429 responses with retry-after when clients exceed the limit
- Document rate limit behavior in the README
- Fix item pagination to return the configured page size

Add per-client request rate limiting

Introduce a small in-memory rate limiter that tracks requests by client IP and
rejects clients after 100 requests in a 60-second window. Wire it into the HTTP
server so throttled requests return 429 with a retry-after header, and document
the behavior in the README.

Also fix pagination to return the configured page size instead of one fewer
item.

Add per-IP request rate limiting

Limit clients to 100 requests per minute using the socket remote address and
return a 429 response with a retry-after header when the limit is exceeded.

Also fix item pagination to return the configured full page size and document
the rate-limiting behavior in the README.

Add per-IP rate limiting to item API

Introduce a small in-memory rate limiter that allows up to 100 requests per
minute per client IP and returns a 429 response with a retry-after header when
the limit is exceeded.

Also fix item pagination to return the full configured page size and document
the new rate limit behavior in the README.
